markdown:
BERT uses the Transformer **as an encoder**, not a decoder.

In the Model Architecture description, the BERT paper states that "BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation described in Vaswani et al. (2017)." [1] The "E" in the name BERT itself stands for "Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers," reflecting this design choice. [2]

A key distinction noted in the paper is that the BERT Transformer uses **bidirectional self-attention** (every token can attend to both left and right context), whereas decoder-style Transformers like OpenAI GPT use constrained self-attention where every token can only attend to context to its left. [1]

Sources
[1] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3 BERT, p. 3
[2] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, Abstract, p. 1
